center.name: 圣迭戈动物园
center.summary: 圣迭戈动物园是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Collared imperial pigeon，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The collared imperial pigeon (Ducula mullerii) is a large pigeon native to New Guinea and adjacent islands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The collared imperial pigeon (Ducula mullerii) is a large pigeon native to New Guinea and adjacent islands
